bird.name: Golden-crowned manakin
bird.summary: The golden-crowned manakin (Lepidothrix vilasboasi) is a small species of perching bird in the manakin family (Pipridae) endemic to Brazil.…

locations.name: 帕拉州
locations.summary: 帕拉（葡萄牙語：Pará，巴西葡萄牙语發音：[pa.'ɾa]）是巴西北部的一个州，首府貝倫。与帕拉州相邻的巴西州份有阿马帕州、马拉尼昂州、托坎廷斯州、马托格罗索州、亚马孙州和罗赖马州。 该州与圭亚那、苏里南接壤。

locations.name: 塔帕若斯河
locations.summary: 塔帕若斯河（葡萄牙語：Rio Tapajós）是南美洲巴西的河流，河道全長約1,200英哩，發源自南緯14度25分的巴西高原，最後注入亞馬遜河。 塔帕若斯河的最長支流是特利斯皮里斯河。

relations.subject: Golden-crowned manakin
relations.evidence: The golden-crowned manakin has a small range in Brazil's southwestern Pará along the upper Cururu and Jamanxim rivers; both are tributaries of the Tapajós River

relations.subject: Golden-crowned manakin
relations.evidence: The golden-crowned manakin has a small range in Brazil's southwestern Pará along the upper Cururu and Jamanxim rivers; both are tributaries of the Tapajós River

relations.subject: Golden-crowned manakin
relations.evidence: "The species is threatened by ongoing deforestation
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

relations.subject: Golden-crowned manakin
relations.evidence: Though it "[a]ppears to tolerate significant forest perturbation, including selective logging...Fieldwork [is] urgently required with the aim of determining the species’ current status and distribution, and the extent of habitat destruction and further threats at known sites"
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
